typography.notes: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings. Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for headings to maintain a modern, editorial aesthetic suitable for a catalog tool.

colors.notes: Minimal gradients. Rely on sharp contrast and monochrome bases. Do not use teal green/blue. Forbidden color: #7351B7.

visual_enhancers.shadows: Crisp edges with minimal blur. Use ambient shadows with 1px solid strokes for container definition.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E4E4E7. Nested radii logic (e.g., parent 12px, child 8px).
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Solid Backgrounds for cards. Avoid generic glassmorphism unless on a sticky header navigating over complex content.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for floating sticky headers (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 with 1px bottom border).

grids_layouts.dashboard_shell: Collapsible left-sidebar navigation for module switching (Products, Catalog Builder, History).
grids_layouts.product_management: High-density split layout. Left sidebar for Category/Subcategory filters, right side for a dense product data table or grid.
grids_layouts.catalog_creator: Split pane F-Pattern layout. Left side: Progressive disclosure settings (Tabs/Accordions for Layout, Grid rows/cols, Styling, Metadata). Right side: Canvas/Live Preview of the catalog.
grids_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing philosophy (p-6, p-8) for forms; dense spacing (p-2, p-4) for data tables and catalog grid previews.

components.buttons: Slightly rounded (rounded-md) or sharp rectangular with clear interaction states (hover:bg-primary_hover hover:text-white).
components.forms: Shadcn components heavily utilized. Left-aligned inputs, select menus for categories, and switch toggles for boolean states.
components.tables: Shadcn tables with sticky headers. Rows should have hover states. Actions (Edit/Delete) clearly visible or accessible via a dropdown menu.
components.modals: Shadcn dialogs with solid backgrounds, used for quick product edits or confirmation dialogs.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 or border color transitions on cards.
motion.lists: Staggered entrance animations for product grids and catalog history items.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA minimums (or WCAG AA). Focus states must have high contrast rings.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

3d_libraries.decision: Not required. Focus on highly performant 2D canvas/CSS grid logic for the catalog live preview.

image_urls.description: Shoes product image for catalog and product lists dummy data
Bag product image for catalog and product lists dummy data
Watch product image for catalog and product lists dummy data

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust dashboard layout with a collapsible sidebar for navigation.
Implement the Product Upload page with a comprehensive Shadcn form.
Implement the Product Management page with a left-side filter sidebar and a data table on the right.

For the Catalog Creation page, use a split-pane layout: a detailed settings panel on the left (using Tabs or Accordion for settings: Layout, Grid rows/cols, Colors, Background) and a live preview area on the right.
Ensure the Catalog Preview dynamically updates using CSS grid/flexbox based on user settings.
Implement the Catalog History page as a clean list or grid of previously generated catalogs.
Use sonner for all toast notifications (success/error states).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Never use placeholder image services. Use the provided image URLs.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not apply universal transitions (`transition: all`). Do not center align the app container. Create depth with layered design elements. Use crisp edges and accessible contrasts. Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
